title: Optimizing Live Stream Visibility: The Technical Guide to Chaturbate Ranking
content:
In the competitive world of live broadcasting, appearing on the front page isn't just about talent—it's a technical challenge. To dominate the rankings, you need to understand the core metric the algorithm looks for: **Viewer Velocity**.

## What is Viewer Velocity?
It's the speed at which users enter your room in a specific window of time. High velocity signals to the platform that your content is trending, which triggers a priority boost.
